steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student needs to complete a sentence about how long ago Tikal Temple IV was built. This requires reading the correct row and column from the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 1,900 to 2,300 years ago.: This is the age of a different pyramid in the table, not Tikal Temple IV. ✗
  • Choice B — 1,300 years ago.: The table's row for Tikal Temple IV gives exactly 1,300 years before present. ✓
  • Choice C — 4,500 to 4,600 years ago.: This is the age of another pyramid in the table, not Tikal Temple IV. ✗
  • Choice D — 3,800 to 4,000 years ago.: This is the age of yet another pyramid in the table, not Tikal Temple IV. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
